creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: nivit
Date: Fri May 31 12:36:02 2013
New Revision: 319489
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/319489

Log:
  - Update to 0.7  [1]
  - Trim Makefile header  [1]
  - Fix MASTER_SITES entries
  - Add license (BSD)
  - Add option BABEL (default off)
  - Convert to the new options framework  [1]
  - Fix WWW field in pkg-descr
  
  Build log:	http://goo.gl/DCc7n
  Release notes:	http://goo.gl/SPXrx
  
  PR:	ports/178991  [1]
  Submitted by:	olivierd

Modified:
  head/textproc/py-genshi/Makefile
  head/textproc/py-genshi/distinfo
  head/textproc/py-genshi/pkg-descr
  head/textproc/py-genshi/pkg-plist

Modified: head/textproc/py-genshi/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-genshi/Makefile	Fri May 31 12:02:54 2013	(r319488)
+++ head/textproc/py-genshi/Makefile	Fri May 31 12:36:02 2013	(r319489)
@@ -1,35 +1,44 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	py-genshi
-# Date created:		2007-01-23
-# Whom:			Nicola Vitale <nivit@email.it>
-#
+# Created by: Nicola Vitale <nivit@email.it>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	Genshi
-PORTVERSION=	0.6
+PORTVERSION=	0.7
 PORTREVISION=	0
 #PORTEPOCH=	0
 CATEGORIES=	textproc www python
-MASTER_SITES=	http://ftp.edgewall.com/pub/${PORTNAME:L}/ \
-		http://nivi.interfree.it/distfiles/${PORTNAME:L}/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://ftp.edgewall.com/pub/${PORTNAME:L}/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	nivit@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Python toolkit for stream-based generation of output for the web
 
+LICENSE=	BSD
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	BABEL
+OPTIONSFILE?=	${PORT_DBDIR}/py-${PORTNAME}/options
+BABEL_DESC=	I18n support through the Babel plugin
+
+PYEASYINSTALL_ARCHDEP=	yes
+
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
 DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}
 EXAMPLESDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/examples/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MBABEL}
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PKGNAMEPREFIX}Babel>=0.9.6:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-babel
+.endif
+
 post-install:
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	cd ${WRKSRC}/doc/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 
-.if !defined(NOPORTEXAMPLES)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
 	${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
 	cd ${WRKSRC}/examples/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${EXAMPLESDIR}
 .endif

Modified: head/textproc/py-genshi/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-genshi/distinfo	Fri May 31 12:02:54 2013	(r319488)
+++ head/textproc/py-genshi/distinfo	Fri May 31 12:36:02 2013	(r319489)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Genshi-0.6.tar.gz) = 32aaf76a03f88efa04143bf80700399e6d84eead818fdd19d763fd76af972a4b
-SIZE (Genshi-0.6.tar.gz) = 433946
+SHA256 (Genshi-0.7.tar.gz) = 1d154402e68bc444a55bcac101f96cb4e59373100cc7a2da07fbf3e5cc5d7352
+SIZE (Genshi-0.7.tar.gz) = 491579

Modified: head/textproc/py-genshi/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-genshi/pkg-descr	Fri May 31 12:02:54 2013	(r319488)
+++ head/textproc/py-genshi/pkg-descr	Fri May 31 12:36:02 2013	(r319489)
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@ for parsing, generating, and processing 
 for output generation on the web. The major feature is a template language,
 which is heavily inspired by Kid. 
 
-WWW:	http://genshi.edgewall.org/
+WWW: http://genshi.edgewall.org/
